sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ النَّاسِ الْعَيْشَ فِي الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi ljudi vole živjeti u gradu.
sentences.translationEn: Many people like living in the city.

sentences.arabic: لَكِنَّ بَعْضَهُمْ يُفَضِّلُ الْهُدُوءَ فِي الْقَرْيَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ali neki od njih više vole tišinu na selu.
sentences.translationEn: But some of them prefer the quiet of the village.

sentences.arabic: الْمَدِينَةُ فِيهَا كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لَكِنَّهَا صَاخِبَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Grad ima sve ali je bučan.
sentences.translationEn: The city has everything but it is noisy.

sentences.translation: Selo je mirno i zrak je u njemu čist.
sentences.translationEn: The village is calm and the air there is clean.

sentences.arabic: كُلُّ شَخْصٍ يَخْتَارُ الْمَكَانَ الَّذِي يُنَاسِبُهُ.
sentences.translation: Svaka osoba bira mjesto koje joj odgovara.
sentences.translationEn: Every person chooses the place that suits them.
